corrections.text: The article attributes Hoekstra's full title — "Dutch European Commissioner for Climate, Net Zero and Clean Growth" — to IO+. That title does not appear in the IO+ article; it is carried verbatim by World Nuclear News, which is also cited in the piece. The title is accurate; only the inline citation pointed to the wrong outlet. (The same sentence's reference to Thorizon CEO Kiki Lauwers is correctly supported by IO+.)
